response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over two decades of solid software engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, his background is strictly in Individual Contributor (IC) roles rather than executive leadership. He lacks the required experience in scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people, managing external delivery partners, and architecting complex, high-stakes fintech infrastructure at a CTO level.
strengths: Extensive backend and distributed systems engineering experience, including microservices and high-throughput environments.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive and architectural capability through founding and maintaining the open-source GISCollective.
concerns: Lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience and has no track record of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers.
No demonstrated experience managing hybrid engineering models, outsourced teams, or communicating technical roadmaps to a board.
Missing deep domain expertise in AI-native fintech infrastructure, algorithmic working capital, or real-time credit risk systems.
